name: check-ui-consistency
description: Workflow to ensure UI consistency across the app by checking design system compliance, spacing, colors, typography, and component usage

workflowSteps.name: Design System Audit
workflowSteps.description: Check if app follows defined design system (colors, typography, spacing)

workflowSteps.name: Component Consistency
workflowSteps.description: Verify consistent use of buttons, cards, inputs, and other components

workflowSteps.name: Spacing & Layout
workflowSteps.description: Check padding, margins, and layout consistency

workflowSteps.name: Typography Check
workflowSteps.description: Verify text styles, font sizes, and weights are consistent

workflowSteps.name: Color Usage
workflowSteps.description: Ensure colors match design system and brand guidelines
